svg.text: GRANULOMA FINGERPRINTS · THE FLAVOR OF GRANULOMA POINTS TO A SPECIFIC PATHOGEN
Stellate microabscesses inside granulomas = cat scratch disease.

g.text: pathologists use these as diagnostic fingerprints
THE IMMUNE STORY · HOW BARTONELLA MAKES A STELLATE MICROABSCESS
WHY HYBRID? Bartonella PARTIALLY resists phagocytosis
→ draws both neutrophils (acute) AND macrophages (chronic) to the same lesion

text.tspan: cat scratch → axillary lymphadenitis → stellate microabscesses in granulomas
